ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trees" (
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tree */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the tree location */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the tree location */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Elevation of the tree location in meters */,
  "genus_species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genus and species of the tree */,
  "plant_date" TEXT /* Date when the tree was planted */,
  "diameter_cm" REAL /* Diameter of the tree trunk in centimeters */,
  "height_m" REAL /* Height of the tree in meters */,
  "crown_width_m" REAL /* Width of the tree's crown in meters */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Current condition of the tree */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who last inspected the tree */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trees_genus_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("genus_species_id") REFERENCES genus_species ("genus_species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genus_species" (
  "genus_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genus and species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the tree */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the tree */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tree */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "native_status" TEXT /* Whether the species is native to the region */,
  "average_lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Average lifespan of the species in years */,
  "preferred_soil_type" TEXT /* Preferred soil type for the species */,
  "water_requirements" TEXT /* Water requirements for the species */,
  "sun_requirements" TEXT /* Sun requirements for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genus_species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree on which the activity was performed */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., pruning, watering) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "estimated_cost" REAL /* Estimated cost of the activity */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost of the activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_activities_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_assessments" (
  "assessment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health assessment */,
  "tree_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tree being assessed */,
  "assessment_date" TEXT /* Date the assessment was performed */,
  "health_rating" TEXT /* Health rating of the tree (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assessment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the assessment */,
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* ID of any disease detected */,
  "pest_id" INTEGER /* ID of any pest detected */,
  "symptoms" TEXT /* Symptoms observed during the assessment */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations for improving tree health */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for the next follow-up assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assessment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_assessments_pest_id FOREIGN KEY ("pest_id") REFERENCES pests ("pest_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_assessments_disease_id FOREIGN KEY ("disease_id") REFERENCES diseases ("disease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_assessments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_assessments_tree_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_id") REFERENCES trees ("tree_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., arborist, urban planner, city official) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diseases" (
  "disease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disease */,
  "disease_name" TEXT /* Name of the disease */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the disease */,
  "treatment_options" TEXT /* Treatment options for the disease */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pests" (
  "pest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pest */,
  "pest_name" TEXT /* Name of the pest */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pest */,
  "control_methods" TEXT /* Control methods for the pest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission_id")
)
